How It Works

Live in 24 hours. No technical skills required.

1

We Configure Your AI

Tell us your qualification criteria (TNB bill minimum, property type, service area). We train Sarah on your exact requirements.

2

Forward Your Calls

Simple call forwarding from your existing number. Takes 5 minutes. No new phone system needed.

3

Wake Up to Bookings

Sarah answers, qualifies, and books site visits directly into your Google or Outlook calendar. You just show up.

Why Solar Companies Choose Zentra

0% Junk Leads

AI filters for Landed property and RM300+ TNB bills. Only qualified prospects reach your calendar.

Site Visits on Autopilot

Direct sync with your existing calendar. Sarah checks availability and books site visits without you lifting a finger.

Own the After-Hours

Capture 9 PM Sunday leads while competitors sleep. Your AI never takes a break.

Beta Program

Currently accepting 2 Solar Firms for our Case Study Program.

Zero upfront service fees.

Ready to Stop Losing Leads?

Be one of the first solar companies to use AI-powered lead capture in Malaysia.

Keep your phone ready. 'Sarah' will call you in 10 seconds.

The "5 Qualified Visits" Guarantee

If Sarah doesn't book at least 5 qualified site visits in your first 14 days, we'll extend your pilot for free until she does. No questions asked.

Zero Risk. Results Guaranteed.

Common Questions

Sarah sounds completely natural in 50+ languages. In our testing, 94% of callers thought they were speaking to a human receptionist. She handles interruptions, asks follow-up questions, and responds naturally.

Sarah is trained to handle common solar questions (ATAP rules, NEM 3.0, financing options, etc.). For anything outside her scope, she'll take a message and immediately WhatsApp you with the details. You never lose the lead.

Sarah asks YOUR qualification questions: TNB bill amount, property type (landed vs high-rise), ownership status, timeline. You set the criteria. She only books visits for leads that pass. Full call recordings and transcripts available in your dashboard.

If you love the results (and you will), we'll discuss a plan that works for your business. If it's not for you, just let us know—no hard feelings, no hidden fees, no awkward sales calls.

We limit partners to protect your competitive advantage. If every solar company in Selangor had Sarah, nobody would have an edge. By limiting to 2 per region, you maintain a real advantage over competitors still relying on voicemail.

Your Competitors Are Already Calling.

The question is: who's answering?

Keep your phone ready. 'Sarah' will call you in 10 seconds.

Only 2 spots left in Klang Valley region.
